replacementDecision.recommendedActivation: Keep STRUCTURED_V2 behind the development feature flag until authorized replay data is collected.

gates.reason: Integrated npm check includes structured state machine, findings, recommendation, agent, and UI checks.
Default replay fixtures produced expected deterministic results.
Structured UI check verifies valid and invalid result screen flow.
Invalid fixture does not produce normal exercise flow in UI checks.
Recommendation validation found no risk cap violation.
Agent validation matched expected policies without unsafe guardrail violations.
pipeline.config.js keeps production default on SAFE_LEGACY_ADAPTER and STRUCTURED_V2 dev-only.
No real or explicitly authorized human landmark dataset is present in the repository.
